<?php /** * This code was generated by * \ / _ _ _| _ _ * | (_)\/(_)(_|\/| |(/_ v1.0.0 * / / */ namespace Twilio\TwiML\Video; use Twilio\TwiML\TwiML; class Room extends TwiML { /** * Room constructor. * * @param string $name Room name */ public function __construct($name) { parent::__construct('Room', $name); } }
